productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Blue & Brown Striped Cap
description: This blue and brown striped, Barcelona football Club themed knit beanie from nike, makes for a perfect addition to your winter and sport wardrobe. Designed to offer snug comfort, this beanie is a great way to beat the chill and enjoy those long winter walks – or wear this during power-packed training sessions, even in winter, to keep you warm. Made of 100% acrylicNearly seamless stitching for abrasion-free comfortFoldable hem with woven text for style CareHand wash in warm water and line dryDo not dry clean, bleach, wring or iron
